intent: 2-STOREY 2BR / 2 bath squarish rear-corner-stair smoke test on the canonical 10x10 lot, no carport. 6x6 envelope per floor (36 m² footprint, 72 m² gross) — inside the locked 2BR/2-bath 65-80 m² band that the narrow 2s pair undershoots. Exercises the squarish 2s signature: both bedrooms side-by-side at the front with street-facing windows (2F-only zone_split), hall-less GF with the great room as circulation, dining counter on the great/kitchen edge, rear-corner stair with the bath2->stairwell wet-stack soft proximity, and the composite GROUND FLOOR | SECOND FLOOR SVG.
must_haves: both bedrooms upstairs, side-by-side, street-facing windows
hall-less ground floor — great room is the circulation
dining counter between great room and kitchen
straight stair in the rear corner off the great room
one T&B per floor, upper bath near the wet stack
